custom_css: .header__inline-menu .header__submenu {background: #fff; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-light); padding: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(44, 37, 32, 0.1); min-width: 200px;}
.header__submenu .header__menu-item {padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light); transition: all 0.2s;}
